expected_note:
Subjective:
Reason for visit: Request for Wegovy for weight loss
Weight: 215 lbs (2 days ago)
Height: 5'7"
BMI: 33.7
Blood pressure: 130/80
HDL: 1.05
Triglycerides: 3.97
Labs: April
Has been working with dietitian (Vicky) for past yr - keto diet, intermittent fasting, high protein
Exercise difficult due to chronic pain and fibromyalgia
Hoping implant removal will improve ability to exercise
Recent surgery: bilateral breast implant removal by Dr. Lutz - implants intact, capsules thin, no concerns
Post-surgery: numbness in chest area, now experiencing pain and sensation returning - possible nerve impingement
Mentally prepared to start weight loss medication now
Previously discussed Wegovy last yr - did not submit paperwork as wanted to try natural approach first
Concerned about side effects - now feels ready
Insurance only approves semaglutide for diabetes, not weight loss

Past Medical History:
History of chronic pain
Fibromyalgia
No diabetes
No sleep apnea

Objective:
Vitals: Weight 215 lbs, height 5'7", BMI 33.7, BP 130/80
Labs (April): HDL 1.05, triglycerides 3.97

Assessment & Plan:
1. Obesity - weight loss management
Wegovy prior authorization forms completed and submitted
Wegovy 0.25mg prescribed pending insurance approval
Rtc once approval received to obtain prescription
